clm.input: state/h_last_raw_*.json (attention tensor 4D L,H,Q,K) or hidden-state SVD fallback
clm.blocker_notes: CLM substrate disabled in adjacent stack (mk_xii_n1_honest_fail_followup_spec C5 row); needs re-enable before live N-5

eeg.signature_primary: α-band (8-12 Hz) phase-locking value (PLV) across electrode pairs
eeg.signature_auxiliary: global field power (GFP) Shannon entropy in 250-400ms window
eeg.vector_per_stim: v_eeg[i] = PLV_α_mean over upper-triangle pairs (120 pairs) in 250-400ms post-stim i
literature_anchors: Sapien Labs PLV awake-resting α range 0.30-0.55
eeg.band_choice_justification: α not γ — Cyton+Daisy fs=125Hz Nyquist 62.5Hz limits γ; CLM↔EEG α-PLV bridge already declared in clm_research_handoff_20260427.md B1-B4

akida.signature: spike-event simultaneity index (SSI) across logical modules
akida.input: AKD1000 spike train file (CSV/binary) per logical module (8-16 partitions of MetaTF graph)
akida.vector_per_stim: v_akida[i] = SSI_mean over upper-triangle pairs in 250-400ms post-stim i
akida.rationale_lower_threshold: AKIDA spike density << EEG continuous; sparse-binary nature requires lower bar than continuous-signal substrates
akida.why_not_plv: spike events are discrete binary times; PLV requires continuous phase φ(t); Hilbert of spike-rate envelope loses spike-timing precision GNW ignition requires

cross_substrate_protocol.stim_format: text token (with optional audio_tone + image_flash triples if AKIDA spike-encoders wired)
cross_substrate_protocol.broadcast_window_rationale: P3b ERP window; matches existing V_phen_GWT entropy window; aligns 3 substrates temporally

thresholds_falsifier_frozen.PASS_significance_margin: r >= 0.50 above critical 0.444 → significant at p<0.05 two-tailed

scope_disclosures: Hard Problem not addressed; zombie problem applies to all 3 substrates equally
AKIDA axis hardware-pending (AKD1000 ETA TBD; AKIDA Cloud $1 trial alternative)
PLV α-band substituted for canonical γ-ignition due to Cyton+Daisy 125Hz fs Nyquist limit
N=20 single-session = corroboration evidence only; multi-session N>=3 required for publication-grade
CLM substrate currently disabled in adjacent stack (mk_xii_n1 C5 row)
honest_C3.discrepancy_with_originating_r_0_85: Friendly report line 142 says r >= 0.85; this spec uses r_3axis_min >= 0.50; r >= 0.85 = aspirational publishable-strength, not frozen predicate; future cycle reaching publication must re-confirm with user

blockers: AKIDA AKD1000 hardware not yet on hand (or AKIDA Cloud trial not yet purchased)
EEG α-PLV sub-mode not yet implemented in tool/an11_b_v_phen_gwt_entropy.hexa
AKIDA SSI tool not yet authored
CLM substrate currently disabled in adjacent stack per mk_xii_n1 C5 — needs re-enable for live measurement
Stimulus-aligned 3-substrate session driver not yet designed (timing protocol cross-hardware needs ms-precision sync)

raw_compliance.raw_9_hexa_only: satisfied — spec doc + state JSON only; no .py/.sh edits
raw_compliance.raw_10_honest_C3: satisfied — §4 dedicates 3 sub-sections to operationalization disclosure + scope limits + band-choice contestability + r_0_85 discrepancy
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this state file = state SSOT; spec doc = doc SSOT
